debug_info.goal:
case some.some.none
𝕜 : Type u_2
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
f g : α → 𝕜
p q : NNReal
hr₀ : none ≠ 0
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p) (some q) none
⊢ ‖f * g‖_[none] ≤ ‖f‖_[some p] * ‖g‖_[some q]

failed_attempts:
have : (‖f * g‖_[∞] : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ (‖f‖_[∞] : ℝ≥0∞) * (‖g‖_[∞] : ℝ≥0∞) := by
      simpa [dLpNorm_top, Pi.mul_apply, ENNReal.iSup_mul] using
        (ENNReal.iSup_mul_le_mul_iSup (f := fun a => (‖f a‖₊ : ℝ≥0∞))
          (g := fun a => (‖g a‖₊ : ℝ≥0∞)))
    exact_mod_cast this
simpa using (dLpNorm_le_dLpNorm_of_exponent_le (f := f * g) (by simpa using hr₀) (by simp))

simpa [dLpNorm_eq_iSup_essSup, ENNReal.top_toReal, dL∞Norm_eq_iSup_norm] using
      (dL∞Norm_mul_le (f := f) (g := g) (p := (some p)) (q := (some q)) hr₀)
simpa [dLpNorm_top] using (le_trans (le_of_eq (dLpNorm_mul_le _ _ (by simpa using hr₀) (p := (some p)) (q := (some q)) (r := (⊤ : ℝ≥0∞)))) (le_rfl))

simpa using (dLpNorm_eq_zero (f * g)).trans_le (by
      simpa [hr₀] using (zero_le (‖f‖_[some p] * ‖g‖_[some q])))
simpa using (dLpNorm_le_dLpNorm_of_exponent_le (f := f * g) (p := (1 : ℝ≥0∞)) (q := (∞ : ℝ≥0∞)) (by simp))

exfalso; exact hr₀ rfl
  simpa using (dLpNorm_mul_le (p := (some p)) (q := (some q)) (r := (some r)) (f := f) (g := g) (by simp) : _)

have : (‖f * g‖_[∞] : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ (‖f‖_[some p] : ℝ≥0∞) * (‖g‖_[some q] : ℝ≥0∞) := by
      simp [dLpNorm, dL∞Norm, Finset.sup_le_iff, mul_le_mul, le_rfl, bot_le]
    exact_mod_cast this
simpa using (dLpNorm_eq_zero (f := f * g)).trans_le (mul_nonneg (by simp) (by simp))
